content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Helpful Maths". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/339/A
constraints: Each number in the input string is between 1 and 9
content.inputFormat: A string of numbers separated by plus signs
content.outputFormat: A single number which is the result of the given mathematical expression

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Split the input string into numbers, sort them, and then concatenate them to form the result
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) due to sorting

code.Python3:
str = input()
arr = [int(x) for x in str if x != '+']
arr.sort()
print(''.join(map(str, arr)))
